info.description: Test tracking and run management REST API.
info.title: TTGO API

delete.description: Erase ALL application data (test cases, runs, folders, etc.) while preserving user accounts. Requires confirmation body {"confirm": "CONFIRM RESET"}. Admin only.

get.description: Returns tests ranked by status-switch percentage

parameters.description: Number of recent runs to analyze per test
parameters.name: lookback

get.description: Returns an aggregated summary of test run analytics
Returns time-series trend data for test runs over a given number of days

parameters.description: Number of days to include in the trend
parameters.name: days

200.description: Trend points array and days count

post.description: Change the currently authenticated user's password. Requires session cookie.
Authenticate with email and password; sets a session_token cookie on success.
Invalidate the current session and clear the session cookie.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user from the session cookie.
Return the current automatic backup schedule configuration.

put.description: Update the automatic backup schedule (enabled, interval, retention count).

get.description: Return all backup records ordered by creation date descending.

post.description: Initiate a manual on-demand database backup. Only one backup/restore operation may run at a time.
Upload a backup file and restore the database from it. Requires confirmation "CONFIRM RESTORE" as a form field. Max upload size 200 MB.

get.description: Return metadata for a single backup by ID.

delete.description: Delete a backup record and remove its file from disk.

get.description: Stream a completed backup file as a binary download.

post.description: Restore the database from a server-stored backup. Requires confirmation string "CONFIRM RESTORE". Creates a pre-restore safety backup and enters maintenance mode during the operation.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of test categories

parameters.description: Maximum number of categories to return
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a new test category with the given name and description
Deletes multiple test categories by their IDs

parameters.description: List of category IDs to delete
parameters.name: body

delete.description: Deletes the test category with the given ID

get.description: Fetch pages in a Confluence space with optional title filter and cursor pagination. Includes already_imported flag.
Fetch a single Confluence page by ID with sanitized HTML body content. Includes already_imported flag.
Fetch direct child pages of a given Confluence page with cursor pagination. Includes already_imported flag.
Fetch available Confluence spaces with cursor-based pagination.
Returns all custom field definitions

post.description: Creates a new custom field definition

delete.description: Deletes a custom field definition by ID

post.description: Creates a new folder, optionally nested under a parent folder.
Deletes multiple folders by their IDs.
Moves multiple folders to a new parent folder.

get.description: Returns the complete folder hierarchy with nested sub-folders and test cases.
Returns a folder with its metadata.

patch.description: Updates the name of a folder.
Updates the parent of a folder. Pass null parent_id to move to root.

parameters.description: New parent ID (or null for root)
parameters.name: body

post.description: Accept reviewed test cases from a parse session and persist them to the target folder. Optionally links them to a requirement.

parameters.description: Tests to accept with target folder
parameters.name: body

post.description: Parse raw AI-generated or pasted content into structured test cases. Supports JSON, markdown table, numbered list, CSV formats with LLM fallback.

get.description: Always returns HTTP 200. Check the `success` field. Returns 400 if Jira is not enabled/configured.
Check whether the system is currently in maintenance mode (e.g. during a restore operation). No authentication required.

post.description: Return qTest mappings for multiple test cases in a single request.
Remove qTest test-case links for every supplied test case ID.

get.description: Return locally enabled qTest projects.

post.description: Add a qTest project to the locally enabled list for upload/sync.
Remove a qTest project from the locally enabled list.
Set an enabled qTest project as the default for uploads.
Import selected test cases from qTest into a TTGO folder, setting QTestId and creating sync mappings.

get.description: Fetch the module tree from qTest for a given project. Falls back to the configured project if project_id is not provided.

parameters.description: qTest project ID (defaults to configured project)
parameters.name: project_id

get.description: Fetch all available projects from the qTest API.

post.description: Push local changes for already-mapped test cases to qTest.

get.description: Fetch test cases from a qTest module, including steps.

post.description: Remove qTest test-case links for a folder, optionally recursing into subfolders.
Upload one or more test cases to a specified qTest module. Supports skip/update conflict resolution.
Create a qTest module from a folder and upload all its test cases. Supports skip/update conflict resolution.

get.description: Returns all requirements ordered by identifier

post.description: Creates a new requirement. Returns 409 if the identifier is already in use.
Imports multiple requirements. Skips already-imported sources and reports failures.
post.summary: Bulk import requirements from Jira or Confluence

post.description: Creates a requirement from an external source with source tracking.
post.summary: Import a requirement from Jira or Confluence

get.description: Returns a single requirement by ID

put.description: Updates identifier, title, and/or description. Returns 409 if the new identifier conflicts.

delete.description: Deletes a requirement and all its traceability links unconditionally. Frontend is responsible for confirmation prompt.

post.description: Creates a traceability link. Returns 409 if the link already exists, 404 if either entity is not found.
post.summary: Link a test case to a requirement

delete.description: Removes the link between a requirement and a test case. Returns 404 if no such link exists.

post.description: Fetch the latest version from the external source. Auto-updates if no local edits; returns a conflict payload if the user has edited locally.
Resolve a requirement resync conflict by accepting the remote version or keeping the local version.
Remove the external source (Jira/Confluence) link from a requirement, making it local-only.

get.description: Return all run folders as a flat list (backward compat) or tree (?view=tree)

post.description: Create a new run folder with the given name, optionally nested under a parent

parameters.description: Run folder name and optional parent_id
parameters.name: body

delete.description: Delete an existing run folder and all its subfolders by ID

patch.description: Update the name of an existing run folder

post.description: Deep-copy a run folder with all subfolders and runs (results reset to PENDING)

patch.description: Update the display order of an existing run folder
Move a run folder to a new parent (or to root if parent_id is null)

get.description: Returns test runs with optional filtering by category list, status, date ranges, and folder.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of category IDs to filter by (OR logic)
parameters.name: category_ids

parameters.description: Single category ID (backward-compatible alias; overridden by category_ids)
parameters.name: category_id

parameters.description: Filter by run status (e.g. PENDING, PASS, FAIL)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Include runs created on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC)
parameters.name: created_from

parameters.description: Include runs created on or before this date inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC)
parameters.name: created_to

parameters.description: Include runs updated on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC)
parameters.name: updated_from

parameters.description: Include runs updated on or before this date inclusive (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC)
parameters.name: updated_to

parameters.description: Sort column: name, status, created_at, updated_at
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Sort direction: ASC or DESC (default DESC)
parameters.name: order

parameters.description: Filter by folder ID; use 'uncategorised' for runs with no folder
parameters.name: run_folder_id

post.description: Upload one or more screenshot files for a run result. Accepts multipart/form-data with files under "screenshots". Max 50 MB total.

get.description: Full-text search across test cases

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Return whether demo data is currently seeded and summary counts.

post.description: Load the demo dataset into the database. Replaces existing demo data if present. Admin only.

delete.description: Remove all demo-seeded entities from the database. Returns 204 if no demo data exists.

get.description: Return the current Confluence integration configuration.

put.description: Create or update the Confluence integration configuration (base URL, email, API token).

get.description: Returns the masked Jira configuration. Returns 404 if not yet configured.

put.description: Upserts the workspace Jira configuration. If api_token is empty, the existing token is preserved.
put.summary: Create or update Jira integration configuration

get.description: Return the current qTest integration configuration with masked API token.

put.description: Create or update the qTest integration configuration (base URL, email, API token, project).

post.description: Verify the qTest API connection using the stored configuration.

get.description: Returns a list of test cases, optionally filtered by folder IDs or category ID

parameters.description: Set to 'list' to omit full Steps/CustomValues and return steps_count instead (smaller payload)
parameters.name: view

post.description: Creates a new test case
Deletes multiple test cases by their IDs. Run results are preserved with a NULL test_case_id.

parameters.description: List of test case IDs to delete
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns the test case whose custom field matches the given name and value
get.summary: Find a test case by custom field value

post.description: Exports selected test cases as a downloadable JSON file with configurable fields

parameters.description: Test case IDs and fields to include
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns a single test case by ID

put.description: Updates an existing test case by ID

delete.description: Deletes the test case with the given ID. Run results are preserved with a NULL test_case_id.

post.description: Associates a category with the specified test case
post.summary: Assign a category to a test case

get.description: Returns all requirements linked to the given test case, ordered by identifier.
get.summary: List requirements linked to a test case

get.description: Return all API tokens

post.description: Create a new API token with the given description and scope

delete.description: Delete an existing API token by ID

get.description: Returns all requirements with their linked test cases and an aggregate coverage summary. Optional ?q= text filter and ?uncovered=true gap filter are applied server-side for API consumers; the React UI filters client-side.

parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring filter on identifier and title
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: If true, return only requirements with no linked test cases
parameters.name: uncovered

get.description: Serve a screenshot file from disk by result ID and filename.
Returns all user accounts. Admin session required.

post.description: Create a new user account. Admin session required.

delete.description: Marks a user as deleted. Evicts all sessions. Admin session required.

patch.description: Partially update a user account (deactivate, reactivate, change role, reset password). Admin session required.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted user. User comes back as inactive. Admin session required.

get.description: Return all webhook configurations

post.description: Create a new webhook configuration with the given URL, description, and event type

delete.description: Delete an existing webhook configuration by ID

get.description: Return paginated dispatch logs for a webhook

parameters.description: Maximum number of logs to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Upgrade to a WebSocket connection for real-time event streaming. Authenticates via session_token cookie. Sends JSON-encoded events for entity changes (test cases, runs, backups, etc.).

options.description: Array of strings for SELECT type

value.description: Stored as JSON to handle basic types

sub_folders.description: Children fields for API responses (not stored in DB directly)

content.description: Raw pasted text or file content

folder_id.description: Optional: target folder for duplicate name detection

duplicate_names.description: Names matching existing TCs in target folder

source_key.description: Jira ticket key or Confluence page ID

sub_folders.description: Children fields for API responses (not stored in DB directly)

defect_type.description:
DefectType classifies the failure reason for FAIL results.
Values: "to_investigate" | "product_bug" | "automation_bug" | "system_issue" | "" (not applicable)

open_defect_link_count.description: Defect link counts (not persisted, populated by GetTestRun)

test_case_id.description: Nullable if test case is deleted

linked_requirements.description: Populated on demand by store.ListRequirementsByTestCase — not persisted.

open_defect_count.description: 008-jira-integration: populated on demand by GetFolderTree — not persisted.

reverification_flagged.description:
008-jira-integration: set true when all linked defects reach statusCategory=="done".
Persists until manually dismissed via DELETE /api/tests/{id}/reverification-flag.

steps_count.description:
Populated on demand by ListTestCases when called with TestCaseFilter.ListView=true.
Not persisted — avoids the cost of Preload("Steps") when the caller only needs the count.

category_id.description: nullable — empty runs have no category

comment_count.description: Comment count (not persisted, populated by list handler)

open_defect_link_count.description: Defect link counts (not persisted, populated by list handler)

retried_count.description: Retry stats (not persisted, populated by GetTestRun/GetTestRuns)

to_investigate_count.description: Defect type breakdowns (not persisted, populated by GetTestRuns list query)

total_results.description: Computed aggregate fields (not persisted, populated by GetTestRuns list query)

line_number.description: Approximate line in the original content

raw_text.description: Original text that couldn't be parsed
